explanation: When the system is in fail-safe mode, the controller must continuously ensure that the inspiratory valve is closed and the expiratory valve is open. This captures the intent of forcing and maintaining the valves in their de-energized states while in fail-safe mode.
decision3_substring: the controller forces input and output valves to their de-energized states (in valve close and out valve open)
output_structured_natural_language: whenever failSafeMode, always satisfy inValveClose & outValveOpen
